## 📝 PR Description
Closes/Fixes Issue: ### 💡 Type of Change
- [ ] ✨ New Feature
- [ ] 🐛 Bug Fix
- [ ] ♻️ Refactoring (Code improvement without changing behavior)
- [ ] 🚨 Other (Please explain in the description)

## 🛠️ Layer / Component Affected
- [ ] 🎨 Frontend (React / Chart.js)
- [ ] ⚙️ Backend (Node / GraphQL / SQLite)
- [ ] 🤖 AI / Prompt Engineering
- [ ] 🧪 QA / Testing

## 📸 Screenshots & Proof of Testing (Minimum 3 Required)
1. **Screenshot 1 (e.g., UI Component / Terminal Output):**
   

2. **Screenshot 2 (e.g., Interactive State / Graph-gene query result):**
   

3. **Screenshot 3 (e.g., Happy path verified / console check):**
   

## 🧪 How to Test This Change?
1. Checkout to this branch: `git checkout <branch-name>`
2. Run the command: `npm run <command>`
3. Verify the following behavior: ## ✅ Developer Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines (TypeScript/Clean Code).
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code before opening this PR.
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally and ensured everything works as expected.
- [ ] My changes do not generate new warnings or errors in the console.
- [ ] I have attached at least 3 screenshots showing proof of my work/testing.
